title: Shuppiym #8206
definition:
Shuppim = "serpents"

 1) son of Iri or Ir, grandson of Bela, and great grandson of Benjamin
 2) a Merarite Levite, son of Hosah, and in charge of the West Gate of
    the temple in the time of David
nasbUsage:
